prompt: Using the provided reference image, redraw the same cat as a deliberately clumsy computer-mouse doodle in a simple MS Paint style. Keep the original centered composition and plain light background, but transform the realistic photo into rough hand-drawn line art with visible wobbly strokes, minimal detail, and an amateur low-effort look. Use thin orange outlines for the head, ears, fur stripes, chest fluff, and body edges; pink scribbled inner ears and nose; black curved closed-eye lines and mouth; and light gray whiskers. Preserve the sleepy closed-eye expression and front-facing pose, but make the drawing look awkward, naive, and slightly messy, like a quick bad sketch traced from the photo.
